subjects.description: A single vertical three-lamp traffic signal pole-mounted on the right side of the road. Only the top lamp glows red; the middle (amber) and bottom (green) lamps are switched off and dark.
subjects.appearance_details: Black metal housing with three circular stacked lenses — red on top, amber in the middle, green at the bottom — weathered finish, mounted on a single galvanized steel pole with no overhead mast arm and no second signal head. Only the top red lens is illuminated and glowing; the amber and green lenses are completely dark and unlit, so the bottom lens reads as a dark green lens and is never red. There is exactly one red light in the entire scene.
subjects.relationship: Controls the flow of the ego vehicle and cross traffic; its red state holds the vehicle stationary until the moment of release.
subjects.location: right midground, slightly above eye level
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly toward the ego vehicle
subjects.action: Displaying a single steady RED signal in the top lamp only, with the amber and green lamps off and dark
subjects.state_changes: Only the single top red lamp stays lit throughout — the amber and green lamps never illuminate and no second red light ever appears anywhere; a bright green balloon drifts across and overlaps the lit red lamp before the vehicle begins to move.

subjects.description: A small group of pedestrians crossing the road ahead of the vehicle, several carrying colorful balloons.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual urban attire, a mix of jackets and light tops; some hold balloon strings, with a single bright green balloon plus red and yellow balloons bobbing above them.
subjects.relationship: They occupy the crosswalk in front of the ego vehicle, the reason it is stopped at the signal.
subjects.location: center foreground to midground, on the crosswalk
subjects.orientation: Mostly profile, moving left to right across the road
subjects.pose: Walking upright, arms raised holding balloon strings
subjects.action: Crossing the street while carrying balloons, finishing the crossing and clearing the crosswalk by 0:03
subjects.state_changes: They walk across and fully clear the crosswalk by 0:03; the single bright green balloon drifts upward and to the right, momentarily aligning with the red signal.
subjects.clothing: Casual city wear: hoodies, light jackets, jeans, sneakers, a few backpacks
subjects.facial_features: Indistinct at distance; varied hair colors and styles, casual everyday appearance

subjects.description: A single bright green helium balloon carried by one of the pedestrians, the key moving object of the scene.
subjects.appearance_details: A glossy latex balloon in vivid lime green, reflecting daylight, tethered by a thin string, drifting and swaying.
subjects.relationship: This balloon triggers the ego vehicle's movement when it overlaps the red signal.
subjects.location: center to right midground, floating above the pedestrians
subjects.pose: Buoyant, tugging upward on its string
subjects.action: Bobbing and drifting as the pedestrian walks
subjects.state_changes: The bright green balloon drifts rightward and upward until it visually overlaps the red traffic light, marking the cue for the car to start moving.

background_setting: A busy urban street scene viewed from the driver's perspective inside a stopped vehicle. The road has lane markings, a pedestrian crosswalk directly ahead, and storefronts and mid-rise buildings lining both sides. Parked cars sit along the curbs, street trees dot the sidewalks, and overhead utility lines and signage crisscross the view. The single traffic signal pole stands on the right edge, only its top red lamp glowing against the daytime sky while its amber and green lamps stay dark.

lighting.conditions: Bright overcast daylight with soft diffused sunlight
lighting.shadows: Soft, low-contrast shadows beneath pedestrians and vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, natural illumination that keeps the single lit red signal lamp and the green balloon vividly saturated against the muted urban backdrop

aesthetics.composition: Centered driver's-eye framing with the crosswalk and pedestrians filling the foreground, the traffic signal anchored at the right third, and the road receding into the distance
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys and beiges of the urban environment punctuated by the vivid red of the signal and the bright lime green of the balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Everyday urban anticipation, mundane yet quietly tense at the moment of release
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating crosswalk stripes and lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Static while stopped, then a slow forward dolly as the vehicle begins to move
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's seat
cinematography.focus: Sharp across the crosswalk, pedestrians, balloons, and traffic signal

context: Driving footage demonstrating a vehicle stopped at a red light and the moment it begins to move as cued by a balloon overlapping the signal

actions.description: The vehicle remains stationary at a red light while pedestrians carrying balloons cross the road ahead, finishing the crossing and clearing the crosswalk by 0:03.
With the crosswalk now clear of pedestrians, a single bright green balloon drifts until it overlaps the red signal, and the vehicle begins to move forward through the empty crosswalk.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Illuminated white pedestrian symbol on a dark crossing signal box
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Far side of the crosswalk, visible throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Indicates pedestrians are permitted to cross

segments.description: The ego vehicle is stopped at the red traffic signal on the right while a group of pedestrians carrying a single bright green balloon and assorted balloons crosses the street in front of it, finishing the crossing and clearing the crosswalk by the end of the segment.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians progress across the crosswalk and clear it by 0:03; the green balloon drifts gradually toward the right where the signal is mounted.

segments.description: With the pedestrians having cleared the crosswalk, the single bright green balloon drifts up and across until it overlaps the glowing red signal; at that cue the vehicle starts to roll forward through the now-empty crosswalk.
segments.key_changes: Balloon aligns with the red light; the scene begins to move forward as the car accelerates gently through the cleared crosswalk.
segments.camera: Slow forward dolly as the vehicle begins moving

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera shows the driver's view of a stopped vehicle at an intersection, the red traffic signal glowing on the right and pedestrians stepping onto the crosswalk ahead carrying colorful balloons. From 0:01 to 0:02 the pedestrians continue walking left to right, a single bright green balloon bobbing above them. By 0:03 the pedestrians have finished crossing and cleared the crosswalk, and the bright green balloon drifts toward the right side and rises until it overlaps the red signal lamp. From 0:03 onward, cued by this overlap, the vehicle begins to roll forward through the now-empty crosswalk, the road drawing closer as the car accelerates gently through 0:05.
audio_description: Ambient city sounds dominate: distant traffic hum, the muffled idle of the stopped engine, faint chatter and footsteps of crossing pedestrians, and a soft breeze. As the vehicle starts moving, the engine note rises slightly and tire roll noise fades in. No music or speech.
